description: The VTG International Scene Wool Houndstooth Tweed Blazer Jacket is a classic and preppy piece perfect for women size 13/14. Made of wool with a houndstooth pattern, this mid-length jacket features long sleeves and a collared neckline. The brown color and tweed fabric add a touch of sophistication, while the button accents and inner pockets provide functionality. Ideal for casual or business occasions, this vintage-inspired jacket is a versatile addition to any winter, fall, or spring wardrobe. Made in Slovakia, this jacket embodies the timeless style of the International Scene brand.
